items.title: Fatigue, Tension, Joy: England Pulls a World Cup All-Nighter
items.summary: The game against Mexico started at 2 a.m. in Britain. Pubs were allowed to stay open unusually late for fans to share the drama together.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
items.summary: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

items.title: Meghalaya CM meets Amit Shah, conveys FCRA amendment concerns
items.summary: Mr. Sangma highlights how the proposed changes could disrupt the functioning of religious, educational, and charitable institutions that have long complemented government efforts
